message:
fix(fr-command): COMMAND GETKEYS/GETKEYSANDFLAGS arity wording matches upstream [bd-frankenredis-tkr0]

Upstream commands.def declares COMMAND|GETKEYS and COMMAND|GETKEYSANDFLAGS
with arity = -3, so a missing-args call replies via addReplyErrorArity
with the subcommand-form name `wrong number of arguments for
'command|getkeys' command`. fr was emitting a custom `ERR Invalid
arguments for 'COMMAND GETKEYS'` / `... 'COMMAND GETKEYSANDFLAGS'`
instead.

Updated the in-tree assertion command_getkeysandflags_rejects_missing_arguments
plus two fixtures in core_server.json so they pin the new wording.

Differential probe vs vendored redis 7.2.4 now byte-matches.
